hero.title: Discover the Best AI Tools
hero.description: Explore our curated collection of AI tools. Find the perfect tools for productivity, creativity, development, and more.

features.title: Everything You Need to Build Fast
features.subtitle: Stop wasting time on boilerplate. Focus on your unique features while this template handles the foundation.

aiOptimized.title: Modern Tech Stack
aiOptimized.description: Built with Next.js 14, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and PostgreSQL. Production-ready from day one.

zeroPipeline.title: Authentication Ready
zeroPipeline.description: Email/password and Google OAuth configured. Session management and protected routes ready to use.

nonTechnical.title: Admin Dashboard
nonTechnical.description: Complete admin panel for user management. Monitor your users and manage permissions easily.

productionGrade.title: Blog System Included
productionGrade.description: MDX-powered blog with i18n support. Create content in multiple languages with SEO optimization.

testimonials.title: Trusted by AI Enthusiasts
testimonials.subtitle: Join thousands of users discovering the best AI tools for their workflows.

items.name: Sarah Chen
items.quote: Toolso.AI helped me find the perfect AI writing assistant. The categorization makes discovery so easy!

items.name: Michael Park
items.quote: Finally, a comprehensive AI tools directory that's well-organized. Saved me hours of research.

items.name: Emily Rodriguez
items.quote: I discover new AI tools every week on Toolso.AI. It's become my go-to resource for AI exploration.

items.name: David Kim
items.quote: The search and filter features are incredibly helpful. Found exactly what I needed in minutes.

items.name: Lisa Wang
items.quote: Love the multilingual support! Makes it easy to explore AI tools in both English and Chinese.

items.name: James Liu
items.quote: Great resource for staying up-to-date with the latest AI tools. The blog section is also very informative.

companies.title: Built with Industry-Leading Technologies
companies.subtitle: Built on modern stack trusted by the world's best teams

aiReady.title: Extensible Architecture
aiReady.description: Clean, modular code structure. Easy to add new features and integrations.

creem.title: Database Ready
creem.description: PostgreSQL with Drizzle ORM configured. Type-safe queries and migrations ready.

auth.title: Authentication System
auth.description: Better Auth with email/password and OAuth. Session management and protected routes ready.

deploy.title: One-Click Deploy
deploy.description: Deploy to Vercel, Railway, or any platform instantly. Production-ready from day one.

typescript.title: TypeScript + Tailwind
typescript.description: Modern tech stack with Next.js 14, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui components.

database.title: Admin Dashboard
database.description: Complete admin panel for user management and system monitoring.

seo.title: SEO & Marketing
seo.description: Meta tags, Open Graph, sitemap, and analytics. Everything for organic growth.

vibeCoding.title: Blog System
vibeCoding.description: MDX-powered blog with multi-language support. Create content that ranks.

cta.title: Find Your Perfect AI Tool
cta.description: Browse our curated collection of AI tools and discover what works best for you.
